featureName: Fix Email Blacklist — API + Settings + Archive Existing
description: Fix the broken email blacklist flow: create the missing API endpoint, fix the handler parameter mismatch, wire the settings page to display/manage blocked senders, and add a checkbox to archive all existing emails from a blocked sender.

userStories.title: Create /api/emails/blacklist route (POST + GET + DELETE)
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want the blacklist API endpoint to exist so that blocking/unblocking senders actually persists to the database.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/emails/blacklist creates entry via EmailBlacklistRepository.addToBlacklist()
POST accepts { senderEmail, reason?, archiveExisting? } and resolves team_id + user_id from auth
GET /api/emails/blacklist returns team blacklist with blocked_by user name joined
DELETE /api/emails/blacklist with { blacklistId } removes entry via removeFromBlacklist()
When archiveExisting=true, all emails from that sender in the team are archived (status='archived')
Auth uses getApiAuthContext() + team_members check (same pattern as /api/emails/route.ts)
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Created app/api/emails/blacklist/route.ts with GET+POST+DELETE. Service role for bulk archive. Joined users table for blocked_by name.

userStories.title: Fix handleBlacklist in mail-client.tsx — pass all params
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want the blacklist button in the 'mark as irrelevant' dialog to properly call the API with emailId, senderEmail, reason, and archiveExisting flag.
acceptanceCriteria: handleBlacklist signature matches (emailId: string, senderEmail: string, reason?: string)
API call sends { senderEmail, reason } to POST /api/emails/blacklist
After successful blacklist, the current email is soft-deleted from UI state
The email counts are updated (inbox decremented)
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Fixed signature from (address: string) to (emailId, senderEmail, reason, archiveExisting). Optimistic UI removal + rollback on failure.

userStories.title: Add 'archive existing emails' checkbox to mark-irrelevant dialog
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, when I block a sender, I want an option to also archive all their existing emails in my inbox so I don't have to manually clean them up.
acceptanceCriteria: Checkbox appears when 'blacklist' radio is selected
Checkbox label: 'Archiver aussi tous les emails existants de cet expéditeur'
Checkbox state (archiveExisting) is passed through onBlacklist callback
handleBlacklist sends archiveExisting to the API
When archiveExisting=true, emails from that sender are removed from UI state
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Added Checkbox component to dialog, archiveExisting state (default true), propagated through callback chain: dialog → email-detail → mail-client → API.

userStories.title: Wire settings page to fetch and display blacklist
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want the email settings page to show all blocked senders so I can review and unblock them.
acceptanceCriteria: Settings page fetches GET /api/emails/blacklist on mount
BlacklistManager displays all entries with sender_email, reason, blocked_by name, date
Unblock button calls DELETE /api/emails/blacklist and removes from UI
Loading state shown while fetching
Empty state shows when no blocked senders
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Added fetchBlacklist() with useCallback, typed state as BlacklistEntry[], real handleUnblock with DELETE API + optimistic update. Loading spinner while fetching.
